steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Translate the percentages: $a = 23.52(b + c)$ and $b = 0.84c$, so $c = \frac{b}{0.84}$. Substitute into the first equation: $$a = 23.52\!\left(b + \frac{b}{0.84}\right) = 23.52b\!\left(\frac{1.84}{0.84}\right)$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Simplify the fraction: $\frac{1.84}{0.84} = \frac{184}{84} = \frac{46}{21}$. Then: $$a = 23.52 \times \frac{46}{21} \times b = 51.52b$$ So $a$ is $51.52 \times 100\% = 5{,}152\%$ of $b$.
